overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing the protagonist Arthur Morgan walking along a dirt path beside railway tracks at night. The scene features overcast skies, dense woodland on one side, and a passing horse rider near the end.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside the railway tracks, moving through the dark countryside

entered.detail: metal railway tracks running parallel to the dirt path into the distance
wooden telegraph poles lining the railway tracks
thick woodland with tall trees creating a dark canopy along the right side of the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the countryside
grassy area between the dirt path and railway tracks

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous walk along a dirt path at night, with railway tracks on the left and dense forest on the right. The overcast sky provides minimal light, and the environment is devoid of other people or vehicles.

events.description: a horse and rider emerge from ahead and pass by on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as a horse rider passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: riding a horse and passing by the player character on the right side of the trail

entered.detail: large fallen tree trunk visible among the trees on the right

segments.scene_description: The walk continues through the dark wooded trail. A horse and rider suddenly appear and pass by on the right, briefly breaking the solitude. The telegraph poles recede behind as the forest draws closer to the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a desolate nighttime path that shifts from an open railway corridor into a more enclosed woodland setting. It begins with a steady walk beside railway tracks under a dim, overcast sky, with a dense forest looming to the right. As the camera progresses, the open space of the tracks recedes and the surrounding trees draw closer to the path, narrowing the field of view. The solitude of the dark trail is then briefly interrupted as a horse and rider emerge from the shadows to pass by on the right. Finally, the scene settles back into the quiet of the woods as the telegraph poles vanish behind the camera.
